option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Image Resize Lambda (Java)
This Lambda consumes SQS messages and creates 128px thumbnails in S3, then updates DynamoDB with the thumbnail key.
## Message format
```json { "postId": "...", "originalImageKey": "uploads/uuid-photo.png", "timestamp": "2026-05-23T10:00:00Z" } ```
## Required environment variables
- `S3_BUCKET` (S3 bucket name) - `DYNAMODB_TABLE` (DynamoDB table name) - `AWS_REGION` (default: `eu-north-1`) - `AWS_ENDPOINT_URL` (optional; use for LocalStack)
## Build
```bash mvn -DskipTests package ```
## Handler
Handler entrypoint: `com.community.news.lambda.ImageResizeHandler::handleRequest`
## Local thumbnail smoke test
```bash mvn -DskipTests test ```
This runs `LocalResizeTest` which generates a sample image and produces `thumb_test.jpg` in the module folder.

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
